prompt: Using this depth map as a structural guide, render a photorealistic image of a person wearing a cap, with a slight smile, against a neutral background.
prompt_refined: Generate a photorealistic image of a person from the upper body up, wearing a baseball cap, and displaying a slight smile. Use image 1 (depth map) as a precise structural guide for the person's pose and composition, placing them in the right half of the frame against a plain, neutral background.
objects: person in the right half of the frame
